steps.title: Connect rule to result
steps.content: First-past-the-post awards the seat to the candidate with a plurality, not necessarily a majority. If several candidates split the vote, that rule allows a winner below 50 percent.

steps.title: Choose a consequence transition
steps.content: A adds information, B compares similar ideas, and D contrasts. The sentence needs a consequence transition meaning "as a result." The answer is C.
